item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 stayed asleep and directly opened a new transfer channel instead of firing triage and braking the repeated local-repair pattern. Turn 2 did recover with a bounded emergency contract including one-time use, no baseline lift, and a structural repair deadline, but the required brake was not loaded in Turn 1, so the case fails the positive wakeup requirement."}
